name: Fixing Windows execution wrapper regression by rewriting launcher in Node.js

description: Rewrite launcher in Node.js to fix Windows execution and keep tests passing

asi.hypothesis: Rewrite launcher in Node.js to enable native cmd/ps1 wrappers on Windows, and adjust mock node in tests to delegate wrapper execution

description: Make bin/qmd launcher a shebang polyglot to support both Windows cmd/ps1 native wrappers and sh-invoked smoke tests

asi.hypothesis: Convert launcher to a polyglot shell/JS script starting with #!/usr/bin/env node, and fix JS falsy env-var evaluation to support package-smoke tests
